시편 24:1.content: The earth is Yahweh’s, with its fullness; the world, and those who dwell in it.

시편 24:2.content: For he has founded it on the seas, and established it on the floods.

시편 24:3.content: Who may ascend to Yahweh’s hill? Who may stand in his holy place?

시편 24:4.content: He who has clean hands and a pure heart; who has not lifted up his soul to falsehood, and has not sworn deceitfully.

시편 24:5.content: He shall receive a blessing from Yahweh, righteousness from the God of his salvation.

시편 24:6.content: This is the generation of those who seek Him, who seek your face—even Jacob.

시편 24:7.content: Lift up your heads, you gates! Be lifted up, you everlasting doors, and the King of glory will come in.

시편 24:8.content: Who is the King of glory? Yahweh strong and mighty, Yahweh mighty in battle.

시편 24:9.content: Lift up your heads, you gates; yes, lift them up, you everlasting doors, and the King of glory will come in.

시편 24:10.content: Who is this King of glory? Yahweh of Armies is the King of glory!
